out_of_scope_note: Methods paper extending canonical correlation analysis (CCA) with sparse regularization and simultaneous dimensionality reduction for fusing fMRI and structural-MRI data. The paper presents a statistical/multivariate data-fusion technique applied to neuroimaging and validates it on simulated and real datasets; it engages no theoretical framework of brain function (no perceptual, decision-making, encoding, or cognitive claim). Per prompt rules, statistical procedures (CCA, sparse regularization, dimensionality reduction) are not theoretical frameworks, and neuroimaging-pipeline / data-fusion tool papers without computational-neuroscience claims are out of scope.
